Class CodeRefinementBatch

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.resources.text.AbstractTextResourceWrite
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java.coderefiner.CodeRefinementBatch
public class CodeRefinementBatch extends AbstractTextResourceWrite
A robust, agent-friendly batch of structural AST modifications for a single Java file.

This class extends AbstractTextResourceWrite to inherit optimistic locking and path resolution, while providing the V4 AST-Guided text replacement engine.

  • Field Details

    • intents

      private List<CodeRefinementIntent> intents
      The linear list of structural changes to apply.

    • optimize

      private boolean optimize
      Whether to optimize imports after applying all changes. Defaults to true.

    • save

      private boolean save
      Whether to save the file to disk after refinement. Defaults to true.

    • importsToAdd

      private List<String> importsToAdd
      List of FQNs to import.

    • importsToRemove

      private List<String> importsToRemove
      List of FQNs to remove from imports.

    • calculatedComments

      private List<LineComment> calculatedComments
      The list of line-level comments calculated during the AST transformation process. These are intended for UI rendering of the changes.

  • Constructor Details

    • CodeRefinementBatch

      public CodeRefinementBatch()

  • Method Details

    • doCalculateResultingContent

      protected String doCalculateResultingContent(Agi agi) throws Exception
      Performs the actual, tool-specific calculation of the resulting content.

      Implementation details: This method executes a multi-stage replay of the modification intents. For each intent, it creates a transient virtual file in a MemoryFileSystem, initializes a JavaSource context, and applies AST-guided text replacements. Finally, it performs import management using GeneratorUtilities to ensure the resulting code is semantically sound.

      Specified by:
      doCalculateResultingContent in class AbstractTextResourceWrite
      Parameters:
      agi - The parent agi session.
      Returns:
      The calculated resulting content as a String.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the calculation logic fails.

    • validate

      public void validate(Agi agi) throws Exception
      Performs pre-flight validation of the update operation. Note: This method ensures state is captured.

      Implementation details: Performs an early execution of the AST refinement pipeline to verify that the resulting content is not identical to the current file state. This prevents redundant disk writes and informs the AI if its proposed changes had no effect due to selector mismatches.

      Overrides:
      validate in class AbstractTextResourceWrite
      Parameters:
      agi - The parent agi session.
      Throws:
      Exception - if validation fails.
